title: PoIRegistryEntry
description: An entry in the ZeroQuery intent registry. Wraps a PoIIntent with anchoring metadata: server timestamp, XRPL memo hash, and filer identity. Forms the immutable audit record.

registryEntryId.description: UUID v4 assigned by the registry at ingestion time.

intentId.description: Mirrors the id field from the wrapped PoIIntent.

filerAddress.description: XRPL r-address that submitted this intent. Used for breach lookup and credit bureau correlation.

receivedAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the registry received and stored this entry.

intentHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical JSON of the PoIIntent (before registry wrapping). Immutable content fingerprint.

xrplAnchor.description: Optional: XRPL transaction that carries this intent hash as a Memo field. Provides court-admissible on-chain timestamp.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this intent. Updated by breach detection or fulfilment confirmation.

resolvedAt.description: Unix timestamp when status moved from active to a terminal state.

breachId.description: registryEntryId of the PoIBreach record, if status == breached.

intent.description: The full PoIIntent payload, stored verbatim.
